reason: Tests require exact gold-specific strings (function name 'install_rustls_crypto_provider', exact comment text 'Multiple dependencies enable different rustls backends' and 'Install one explicitly before any TLS client config is built'). Specifying these in instruction.md violates no_solution_leakage; omitting them violates behavior_in_task_description. This is a test design flaw (solution_uniqueness_guard fails) - tests verify text not behavior. Cannot reconcile without rewriting tests.
